{{Infobox character
| name = Visiri
| species = Alien
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|energy pools, empowerment, concussive bolts, hovering, flying}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, red auras, levitation}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karoshan Alliance]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|explorer, pistol duelist, warriors}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, [[Combat Artist|Combat Artists]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visirian capital]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Visiri Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Visiri are a superhuman species characterized by their red skin and three eyes. While their primary pair of eyes functions normally, their third eye is a unique biological feature capable of perceiving [[life]] energy and vitality. Physically, they are exceptionally strong, with warriors able to damage starship plating using only their hands. They possess a natural talent for Aetheric [[Combat Arts]], though they generally maintain a weaker connection to the [[Aether]] than other intelligent lifeforms. Despite their high physical capabilities, they are unable to survive in environments lacking an atmosphere. The Visiri inhabit the [[Visiria system]], which serves as a major component of the [[Karoshan Alliance]]. As the second most significant power within this alliance, their territory includes several planets and a fleet of crimson-striped ships. The Visiri people hold diverse views on galactic events, such as the actions of [[The Last Horizon]]; some see them as protectors who repelled the [[D’Niss invasion]], while others view them as unstable. Their society includes various roles, ranging from [[High Council]] members and planetary governors to specialized combat artists and military forces.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Visiri are a species of skilled flyers characterized by their ability to use energy pools for hovering, empowerment, and firing concussive bolts. While they possess a weaker connection to the [[Aether]] than other intelligent species, their warriors are formidable enough to tear through starship armor with their bare hands. Notable individuals include the muscled, pale pink-skinned [[Reaver]] and the man [[Raion Raithe]], as well as the half-Visiri Denon Javal. This species is further defined by physical traits such as scarlet skin and three eyes, with some members serving as [[pistol]] duelists or powerful warriors.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Visiri]] explorer found [[Horizon]] last week.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiri]] is an opponent with three eyes and scarlet skin.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Visiri]] [[pistol]] duelist is a character Shyrax defeats.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion Raithe]] is a [[Visiri man]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiri]] warriors are known to be able to tear starship armor with their bare hands.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiri]] are a species with energy pools used for empowerment, concussive bolts, and hovering.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiri]] warriors are skilled at flying.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visiri]] tend to have a weaker connection to the [[Aether]] than other intelligent species.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Reaver]] is a muscled [[Visiri man]] with pale pink skin.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator is a powerful [[Visiri]] warrior.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Raion]] is a [[Visiri]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33">''The Captain'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Denon Javal is half-[[Visiri]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Visiri are a species characterized by their immense physical strength. While several of their home planets are members of the [[Alliance]], these beings are unable to survive in environments lacking an atmosphere. Among their kind is a woman known as the [[Blade Dancer]], and during recent conflicts, Visiri men have been responsible for holding [[Jak Escalon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Blade Dancer]] is a [[Visiri]] woman.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Visiri]] are a type of being with high physical strength.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Alliance]] contains a handful of [[Visiri]] planets.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Visiri]] cannot survive outside an atmosphere.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Visiri]] men are holding [[Jak Escalon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|As one of the five intelligent species in the galaxy, the Visiri are a superhuman group of people characterized by having three eyes. Their third eye is specifically designed to monitor energy and vitality. Within the [[Karoshan Alliance]], they serve as the clear second-ranking power, with their own capital being populated mostly by their own kind. These high-level Combat Artists frequently fight in the ring using spears and swords for dueling. Ultimately, they become a group that the crew intends to disable.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] are one of the five species of intelligent beings in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] are opponents fought in the ring.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] are high-level Combat Artists.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] make up most of the crowd in the [[Visirian capital]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri]] species are universally superhuman.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri]] have three eyes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri]] possess a third eye designed for watching vitality and energy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] are a group of fighters/people.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri]] are the clear number two in the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] are not known for their magical scanners.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri]] are a group that the crew intends to disable.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visiri]] are a group that uses swords and spears for dueling.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Visiri]] are a group of people who use red auras and levitation.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Visiri]] are neighbors to Shyrax's culture.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Visiri]] relief effort is ongoing.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Visiri aren’t known for their magical scanners.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Sola, target the Visiri. Disable if you can.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
